title: sisymbrium austriacum subsp. chrysanthum
intro: Sisymbrium austriacum subsp. chrysanthum, also known as Austrian hedge mustard or Chrysanthemum-leaved hedge mustard, is a perennial plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sisymbrium austriacum subsp. chrysanthum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its possible anti-cancer and anti-bacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Sisymbrium austriacum subsp. chrysanthum is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
